message:
feat(runtime): add Asupersync as primary executor with Tokio compat bridge

Phase 1 of runtime migration from Tokio to Asupersync structured
concurrency:

- main.rs: Replace #[tokio::main] with manual Asupersync runtime as
  primary executor. Tokio retained as secondary compat bridge via
  asupersync_tokio_compat::runtime::with_tokio_context. Add
  build_asupersync_runtime() and build_tokio_compat_runtime() helpers,
  root Cx capability token for structured concurrency. Includes
  comments referencing Phases 2a-2e for incremental migration.
  2 new tests: runtime_bootstrap_runs_tokio_compat_work and
  build_version_includes_package_sha_and_timestamp
- Cargo.toml: Add tokio as explicit workspace dependency with broad
  feature set (fs, macros, net, process, rt-multi-thread, signal,
  sync, time) — intentionally broad during migration period
- Cargo.lock: +20 transitive dependencies for asupersync and
  asupersync-tokio-compat (franken-decision, franken-evidence,
  franken-kernel, futures-lite, polling, rmp-serde, etc.)
- 5 crate Cargo.tomls (vc_alert, vc_cli, vc_collect, vc_oracle,
  vc_web): Add tokio.workspace = true alongside asupersync deps

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

-# Async runtime
+# Async runtime (primary)
 asupersync = { path = "/dp/asupersync" }
 asupersync-tokio-compat = { path = "/dp/asupersync/asupersync-tokio-compat" }
+# Tokio kept as an explicit compat bridge while crate-local migrations land in
+# Phases 2a–2e. This is intentionally broad so each crate can compile until its
+# direct Tokio usage is removed.
+tokio = { version = "1", features = ["fs", "macros", "net", "process", "rt-multi-thread", "signal", "sync", "time"] }
 
 # Database
 duckdb = { version = "1.4", features = ["bundled"] }
